title: Critters Delight
description: An addon adding more culinary content for More Critters with Farmer's Delight
body:
Critters Delight requires the More Critters and Farmer's Delight mods for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1!

📖 About

Critters Delight adds more meats and ingredients inspired by or that come from the many creatures from the More Critters mod! Additionally, integrational recipes and items have been added between the two mods!

More Information

  • Some creatures in More Critters now drop their meat with the help of a knife
    • Any meat dropped will become cooked if the mob in question is set ablaze
    • Most meats or meat-adjacent items can be cut into alternative ingredients
    • Bouncelizard can drop Raw Slabs of Bouncelizard upon death
    • All aquatic creatures (except for the Iropod) can drop their respective raw items upon death
      • Kelpire instead can drop Raw Kelpire Guts
      • Stincarp can additionally drop Volatile Gills
    • Warptrap can drop Raw Warpnosh or Raw Trapperloin upon death
    • Mightshroom can drop Raw Mightshroom Thighs upon death
  • Avec Du Sang is not a main food, but rather an ingredient for other foods. Stems from the Warptrap
  • Voltaic Sauce is not a main food, but rather an ingredient for other foods. Stems from the Stincarp
  • Glacial Dough and Raw Froughsta are not main foods, but rather ingredients for other foods. Stems from the Snowflake Spider


  • Elastic Strips and Bouncelizard Eggs which gives the player the Jump Boost V and Nourishment status effects
  • Fission Salad which gives the player the Innate and Comfort status effects
  • Grilled Stincarp which gives the player the Innate and Nourishment status effects
  • Warper Bites which gives the player the Bulwark status effect
  • Trapper's Braise which gives the player the Bulwark II and Comfort status effects
  • Critter Dip which gives the player the Resistance II and Nourishment status effects
  • Froughsta with Mightshroom Cuts which gives the player the Nourishment status effect
  • Volt Glazed Mightshroom Thighs which gives the player the Gift of Fungi and Nourishment status effects
  • Explosive Salad which gives the player the Comfort status effect
  • Mightshroom Rice which gives the player the Gift of Life and Nourishment status effects


  • Bounceberry Cheesecake which gives the player the Jump Boost and Speed status effects per slice
  • Nauticramari Medley is an arrangement of different seafood options presented by Critters Delight
  • Stuffed Kelpire Guts which gives the player the Water Breathing and Nourishment status effects per bowl


  • Blossoming Blossombush Seeds are a small snack from cooking some Blossombush Seeds
  • Puffy Spread Toast which gives the player the Bombastic status effect
  • Lesser Stincarp Roll is a sushi roll comprised of Stincarp meat
  • Avoider Roll is a sushi roll comprised of Avoider meat
  • Blubberfish Roll is a sushi roll comprised of Blubberfish meat
  • Gutted Kelpire Roll is a sushi roll comprised of Kelpire guts
  • Nauticramari Roll is a sushi roll comprised of Nauticrawl tentacles
  • Bowl of Iscream which gives the player the Comfort status effect
  • Bomblings which gives the player the Combustion and Bombastic status effects
  • Bounceberry Cheesecake Slice which gives the player the Jump Boost and Speed status effects


  • Both Vita and Mori Shrooms have colony variants now
  • You can now craft a Shark Tooth Knife, acting like any other knife
  • You can now craft a Ghostly Cabinet to match with the rest of the Ghostly woodset
  • There are 4 status effects introduced in Critters Delight
    • Innate makes you immune to the Electrofied status effect
    • Bombastic makes you immune to explosive damage
    • Bulwark adds 4 armour points per level
    • Gift of Fungi halves the damage taken from the Mightshroom and, if the inflicted player has a tamed Nightshroom, then the Nightshroom will gain Speed 4 and Strength 2 while the effect is active
